text: Being here, I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The sterile yet open architecture of the hallway, with its glass doors and emergency equipment, makes me think of the transitions and thresholds in life—moments when we cross from one state of being to another. Stepping inside, the vibrant and informative display about research and development fills me with inspiration. The merging of creative ideas and human innovation reminds me that our search for meaning is an ever-evolving journey. I feel both small and invigorated, aware of my own desire to connect, learn, and contribute to something larger than myself.
